title: KilleadSMP
description:
Archive - Modpack For Player Of KilleadSMP !
Useful mods : SIMPLEVOICECHAT / ESSENTIALS and more !
body:
## The Modpack For Player Of KilleadSMP ! 
* **This modpack is the official and public version for the KILLEADSMP server**
* _You can also use this modpack on other servers !_
* You need at least 4GB(allocated for Minecraft) for run this modpack with no lag
## FR : Le Modpack Pour Les Joueurs de KilleadSMP ! 
* **Ce modpack est la version officiel et publique pour le serveur KILLEADSMP**
* _Vous pouvez aussi utiliser ce modpack pour d'autres serveur !_
* Vous aurez besoin d'au moins 4 GO de ram (allouée à Minecraft) pour faire tourner ce modpack sans lag!
### FABRIC 1.21.1 
**MODS :**
- [CLEAN F3](https://modrinth.com/mod/clean-f3) 
- [ESSENTIALS MOD ](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential)
- [GAMMA UTILS](https://modrinth.com/mod/gamma-utils) 
- [IN-GAME ACCOUNT SWITCHER ](https://modrinth.com/mod/in-game-account-switcher)
- [LIMTEATICA](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/litematica)
- [LITEMATICA PRINTER](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica-printer)
- [MALILIB](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/malilib) 
- [MIDNIGHTLIB](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnightlib) 
- [REPLAYMOD](https://modrinth.com/mod/replaymod) 
- [SIMPLE VOICE CHAT](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) 
- [VIAFABRICPLUS](https://modrinth.com/mod/viafabricplus) 
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium/versions)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
- [Xaeros MiniMap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)
- [Xaeros WorldMAP](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)
